intro: Today we are ranking Rice Cakes as a grain, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.

sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 3g. omega 3 is kind of ridiculous. for a grain, you want the carbs to behave, not just show up.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 3g. omega 3 is kind of ridiculous. for a grain, you want the carbs to behave, not just show up.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 81.5g. glycemic index and starch stand out most. for a grain, the whole fight is between stability and refinement.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 81.5g. glycemic index and starch stand out most. for a grain, the whole fight is between stability and refinement.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 7g. bioavailability is kind of absurd. for a grain, this is really about carb behaviour.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 7g. bioavailability is kind of absurd. for a grain, this is really about carb behaviour.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. everything else is kind of whatever.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most. everything else is kind of whatever.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 13% DV, iron at 7% DV stand out most. everything else is kind of whatever.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 13% DV, iron at 7% DV stand out most. everything else is kind of whatever.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: biggest pros here. portable and convenient. easy to portion and carry. works with many toppings.

displayItems.title: portable and convenient
displayItems.explanation: Very easy to use as a quick snack base.

sections.subtitleText: biggest pros here. portable and convenient. easy to portion and carry. works with many toppings.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: biggest cons here. weak grain-category payoff. glycemic impact is harsh. not very filling for the calories.

displayItems.title: weak grain-category payoff
displayItems.explanation: Very poor fibre/GI combination compared with stronger grains.

displayItems.title: glycemic impact is harsh
displayItems.explanation: The GI behaviour is a major category problem.

displayItems.title: not very filling for the calories
displayItems.explanation: Can be unsatisfying unless built up with other foods.

sections.subtitleText: biggest cons here. weak grain-category payoff. glycemic impact is harsh. not very filling for the calories.

closing.summary: So overall, Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
closing.useCaseNote: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 21 from a base nutrition score of 30. Context dragged it down by 9 points.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
